channel.title: Lexmark International Inc. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Lexmark International Inc. (lexmark).

item.title: CVE-2025-65078 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Untrusted search path vulnerability in Embedded Solutions Framework
item.description: An untrusted search path vulnerability has been identified in the Embedded Solutions Framework in various Lexmark devices. This vulnerability can be leveraged by an attacker to execute arbitrary code.

item.title: CVE-2025-65077 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Relative path traversal vulnerability in Embedded Solutions Framework
item.description: A relative path traversal vulnerability has been identified in the Embedded Solutions Framework in various Lexmark devices. This vulnerability can be leveraged by an attacker to execute arbitrary code as an unprivileged user.

item.title: CVE-2025-65081 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Out-of-bounds read vulnerability in Postscript interpreter
item.description: An out-of-bounds read vulnerability has been identified in the Postscript interpreter in various Lexmark devices. This vulnerability can be leveraged by an attacker to execute arbitrary code as an unprivileged user.

item.title: CVE-2025-65080 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Type confusion vulnerability in Postscript interpreter
item.description: A type confusion vulnerability has been identified in the Postscript interpreter in various Lexmark devices. This vulnerability can be leveraged by an attacker to execute arbitrary code as an unprivileged user.

item.title: CVE-2025-65079 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Heap-based buffer overflow vulnerability in Postscript interpreter
item.description: A heap-based buffer overflow vulnerability has been identified in the Postscript interpreter in various Lexmark devices. This vulnerability can be leveraged by an attacker to execute arbitrary code as an unprivileged user.

item.title: CVE-2025-9269 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) vulnerability found in embedded web server
item.description: A Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) vulnerability has been identified in the embedded web server in various Lexmark devices. This vulnerability can be leveraged by an attacker to force the device to send an arbitrary HTTP request to a third-party se…

item.title: CVE-2025-4046 · 8.5 HIGH — Missing Authorization in Lexmark Cloud Services badge management
item.description: A missing authorization vulnerability in Lexmark Cloud Services badge management allows attacker to reassign badges within their organization

item.title: CVE-2025-4044 · 8.2 HIGH — XML External Entity Injection vulnerability in various Lexmark Universal Drivers
item.description: Improper Restriction of XML External Entity Reference in various Lexmark printer drivers for Windows allows attacker to disclose sensitive information to an arbitrary URL.

item.title: CVE-2024-11347 · 7.3 HIGH 🌩️ — Access of Resource Using Incompatible Type in Postscript interpreter
item.description: Integer Overflow or Wraparound vulnerability in Lexmark International CX, XC, CS, et. Al. (Postscript interpreter modules) allows Forced Integer Overflow.The vulnerability can be leveraged by an attacker to execute arbitrary code as an unprivileged u…

item.title: CVE-2024-11346 · 7.3 HIGH 🌩️ — Access of Resource Using Incompatible Type in Postscript interpreter
item.description: : Access of Resource Using Incompatible Type ('Type Confusion') vulnerability in Lexmark International CX, XC, CS, et. Al. (Postscript interpreter modules) allows Resource Injection.This issue affects CX, XC, CS, et. Al.: from 001.001:0 through 081.2…

item.title: CVE-2024-11344 · 7.3 HIGH 🌩️ — Type confusion vulnerability in the Postscript interpreter in various Lexmark devices
item.description: A type confusion vulnerability has been identified in the Postscript interpreter in various Lexmark devices. The vulnerability can be leveraged by an attacker to execute arbitrary code.

item.title: CVE-2025-1127 · 9.1 CRITICAL — Combination Path Traversal and Concurrent Execution vulnerability exists within the embedded web server
item.description: The vulnerability can be leveraged by an attacker to execute arbitrary code as an unprivileged user and/or modify the contents of any data on the filesystem.

item.title: CVE-2024-11345 · 7.3 HIGH 🌩️ — Heap-based memory vulnerability in the Postscript interpreter in various Lexmark devices
item.description: A heap-based memory vulnerability has been identified in the Postscript interpreter in various Lexmark devices. The vulnerability can be leveraged by an attacker to execute arbitrary code.

item.title: CVE-2025-1126 · 9.3 CRITICAL — Lexmark has identified a vulnerability in our Lexmark Print Management Client (LPMC).
item.description: A Reliance on Untrusted Inputs in a Security Decision vulnerability has been identified in the Lexmark Print Management Client.

item.title: CVE-2023-50733 · 8.6 HIGH 🌩️ — A Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) vulnerability exists in newer Lexmark devices.
item.description: A Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) vulnerability has been identified in the Web Services feature of newer Lexmark devices.

item.title: CVE-2023-50739 · 8.8 HIGH — A buffer overflow vulnerability has been identified in the Internet Printing Protocol (IPP) in various Lexmark devices.
item.description: A buffer overflow vulnerability has been identified in the Internet Printing Protocol (IPP) in various Lexmark devices. The vulnerability can be leveraged by an attacker to execute arbitrary code.

item.title: CVE-2023-50738 · 4.3 MEDIUM — A firmware downgrade prevention vulnerability has been identified in newer Lexmark devices.
item.description: A new feature to prevent Firmware downgrades was recently added to some Lexmark products. A method to override this downgrade protection has been identified.

item.title: CVE-2023-50737 · 9.1 CRITICAL — An input validation vulnerability in the SE Menu allows an attacker to execute arbitrary code.
item.description: The SE menu contains information used by Lexmark to diagnose device errors. A vulnerability in one of the SE menu routines can be leveraged by an attacker to execute arbitrary code.

item.title: CVE-2023-50736 · 9 CRITICAL 🌩️ — A vulnerability has been identified in the PostScript interpreter in various Lexmark devices.
item.description: A memory corruption vulnerability has been identified in PostScript interpreter in various Lexmark devices. The vulnerability can be leveraged by an attacker to execute arbitrary code.

item.title: CVE-2023-50735 · 9 CRITICAL 🌩️ — A vulnerability has been identified in the PostScript interpreter in various Lexmark devices.
item.description: A heap corruption vulnerability has been identified in PostScript interpreter in various Lexmark devices. The vulnerability can be leveraged by an attacker to execute arbitrary code.

item.title: CVE-2023-50734 · 9 CRITICAL 🌩️ — A vulnerability has been identified in the PostScript interpreter in various Lexmark devices.
item.description: A buffer overflow vulnerability has been identified in PostScript interpreter in various Lexmark devices. The vulnerability can be leveraged by an attacker to execute arbitrary code.
